meta.question: Does this model contain any parallel execution? (Model ID: 0b4394edaa09437d93cc54c78c0180cb)
meta.finalAnswer:
Yes, the model with ID 0b4394edaa09437d93cc54c78c0180cb contains parallel execution. It includes two ParallelGateway elements:
1. https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-00E07E95-7526-4B8C-BACC-C00BBAB4E570
2. https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-95EDDF96-752C-4BC2-AB18-629BE80CE91F

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?element ?type ?name
WHERE {
  ?element tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?definitions .
  ?definitions tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "0b4394edaa09437d93cc54c78c0180cb" .
  ?element a ?type .
  FILTER(?type IN (bboExt:ParallelGateway))
  OPTIONAL { ?element bbo:name ?name . }
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The query successfully identified two ParallelGateway elements within the specified model, confirming that the model contains parallel execution.
